description: A short LLM-written prose summary of Ethan's coding over the last 7 days, derived from the same GitHub + WakaTime activity. Plain third-person paragraph — quote it directly when summarizing what he's currently working on.

data.summary: This week Ethan Qiu spent 2 hrs 30 mins coding, averaging 1 hr 15 mins per day. On GitHub, he opened 12 pull requests in qiuethan/Misty, from #106 through #117. His tracked coding was mostly in Java, with some Python and Markdown.
